creator: toshihito_shibasaki@private.so-net.jp
text:
When installing FreeBSD 8.0-Release with DVD made of ISO file downloaded from "ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/ISO-IMAGES/8.0/", 
installation cannot complete due to no recognition of DVD-drive (when I select DVD/CD as install-media, the answer of "no DVD/CD drive was found" is given, though installation till that stage was done with DVD media. 
I have tried installation with this media on several machines. All machines except this machine do not have any problem. Difference of this machine from others is its DVD-drive is connected by internal USB port while others are connected by SATA or IDE.

How-To-Repeat: When I repeat installation procedure on this machine, I can always face this problem.
